posts.highlight: 爪哇摄影工作坊 · 伊真火山传说
posts.description: Jord Hammond opens spots for his Java photography workshop, highlight being the legendary Mt. Ijen blue fire crater
posts.description_zh: 摄影师 Jord 开放爺哇工作坊名额，亮点是亲历伊真火山蓝色火焰奇景
posts.caption_en: A few spaces have opened up for my Java photography workshop. We'll be visiting Mt. Ijen — one of those places that simply has to be experienced to be believed… it's without a doubt one of the most impressive places I've ever visited.
posts.caption_zh: 我的爺哇摄影工作坊还有几个名额。我们将前往伊真火山——那是一个亲眼目睷才能相信的地方……毫无痑问是我去过最震撼的地方之一。
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Jord Hammond opens spots for his Java photography workshop, highlight being the legendary Mt. Ijen blue fire crater. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.highlight: 巴厘岛稻田 · 永不枯竭的灵感源
posts.description: Bali rice terraces series: farmer clearing damaged crops before harvest, women carrying heavy rice grain sacks through the fields
posts.description_zh: 摄影师 Jord 镜头下的巴厘岛梯田：收获前农夫清理受损稻苗，妇女扬着刚收割的稻谷袋穿行田间
posts.caption_en: Here are a few from Bali's rice terraces, an endless source of inspiration. A farmer clearing dead palm fronds from his field just a few weeks from harvest. Three farmers carrying sacks of freshly harvested rice grains.
posts.caption_zh: 巴厘岛梯田里的几个瞬间，永不枯竖的灵感来源。收获前几周清理枯棕槕叶的农夫，以及扬着刚收割稻谷袋的三位农夫。
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose.
